name: EnigmAgent — Local AI Secret Vault
summary: Secure local vault for AI agents. Store API keys encrypted, use {{PLACEHOLDER}} references. Zero cloud.
description:
EnigmAgent is a privacy-first credential vault for AI developers.

Store your API keys, tokens, and passwords in a local AES-256-GCM encrypted vault. Reference them as {{PLACEHOLDER}} in AI prompts and automation scripts — the vault resolves them automatically.

Key features:
• 100% local — no cloud sync, no accounts required
• AES-256-GCM + Argon2id encryption
• Integrates with 40+ AI frameworks
• Works with LangChain, CrewAI, n8n, AutoGen, and more
• Domain-bound access control

https://enigmagent.com
